articles.title: Palestinians mourn Gaza World Cup screenings organiser killed in Israeli strike
articles.difficulty_reason: Short human-interest report with a clear, chronological story and short sentences; mostly B1/B2 vocabulary and low background knowledge needed.

articles.title: Ukrainian agent accused of murdering Monaco bomb suspect changes story
articles.difficulty_reason: A twisting crime-and-intelligence narrative with moderate sentence complexity and legal vocabulary; some background on the war and courts helps but the story stays clear.

articles.title: Ukraine strikes Russian ships near Crimea, escalating attacks on fuel supplies
articles.difficulty_reason: Dense, analytical military-and-logistics report with long sentences, naval and economic terminology, and considerable background knowledge required about the war.
